requested_items.objective: Evaluate larger attention-tail proxy models to determine whether softmax occupancy, waits, or backpressure justify a follow-on architecture proposal.

expected_result.reason: Stress evidence should decide whether to pursue softmax buffering, pipeline partitioning, scheduler overlap work, or continue toward richer decoder benchmarks without architecture changes.
